name: signingExportKey
title: Export Key (Signing Service)
description: Export (reveal) the private seed for a stored key. Elevated: first call returns confirmUrl, retry with confirmToken.

publicKey.description: Public key identifying which key to export (hex string)

passphrase.description: Passphrase used when the key was created or imported

confirmToken.description: Confirmation token from browser approval (omit on first call)

seed.description: Decrypted Ed25519 seed (hex string, returned after confirmation)

status.description: confirmation_required when user approval is needed

confirmUrl.description: URL for user to visit and approve the operation

confirmToken.description: Token to include when retrying after approval
